ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulation_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulation condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulation condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulation condition */,
  "stimulation_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulation (e.g., visual, auditory, etc.) */,
  "intensity_level" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the stimulation (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "herd_types" (
  "herd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each herd type */,
  "herd_name" TEXT /* Name of the herd type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the herd type */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Average group size for this herd type */,
  "social_influence" TEXT /* Level of social influence within the herd (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("herd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "framing_types" (
  "framing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each framing type */,
  "framing_name" TEXT /* Name of the framing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the framing type */,
  "frame_type" TEXT /* Type of frame used (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "emphasis" TEXT /* Level of emphasis on the frame (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_types" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer type */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the offer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offer type */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward offered (e.g., monetary, non-monetary) */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player choice */,
  "choice_name" TEXT /* Name of the player choice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the player choice */,
  "choice_type" TEXT /* Type of choice made (e.g., rational, irrational) */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale behind the choice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stimulation condition */,
  "herd_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the herd type */,
  "framing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the framing type */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offer type */,
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player choice */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant in milliseconds */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the participant */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "pre_test_survey" TEXT /* Pre-test survey results */,
  "post_test_survey" TEXT /* Post-test survey results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_framing_id FOREIGN KEY ("framing_id") REFERENCES framing_types ("framing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES stimulation_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_herd_id FOREIGN KEY ("herd_id") REFERENCES herd_types ("herd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offer_types ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_choice_id FOREIGN KEY ("choice_id") REFERENCES player_choices ("choice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "participant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the participant */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., pre-test, post-test) */,
  "survey_results" TEXT /* Results of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
